beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: The 2025/2026 UEFA Women's Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. This is the first season under a new format, which have 18 participating teams, playing six games each against different opponents in a league phase, all in a joint group. The teams are competing for a place in the final that will be played at the Ullevaal Stadion in Oslo, Norway on May 2026. Barcelona are the current Champions.

beIN SPORTS 7.desc_ar: Held at Hard Rock Stadium, the Miami Open uses Laykold hard courts, playing noticeably faster than Indian Wells. Heat, humidity, and night sessions influence match dynamics, while the tournament traditionally produces long matches and physical battles as players complete the Sunshine Double.

beIN SPORTS 6.desc_ar: The Premier Padel tour heads to Mexico for the Cancun P2, staged at the Rafael Nadal Academy in Costa Mujeres. The tournament features men’s and women’s draw, with main-draw action unfolding across the week as players compete for valuable ranking points and prize money. As one of the key stops on the 2026 calendar, the event brings top-level padel to Cancun with the race to the title building toward finals weekend.
